content.en:
"Then send it to the photo!"

Ye Tian said.

"Good!"

The lord of Cangshan immediately went through the formalities for Ye Tian to send the photo, and also gave Ye Tian a certificate of contract agreement.

After all this.

The Lord of Cangshan said: "Lord of Endless, due to the high value of the items you sent, we have specially arranged a special private room for you, which uses the special materials of the land on the other side of eternity, plus the top-level formation, which can shield the exploration of the bone transformation realm. In this way, you can ensure that your identity is not revealed. "

"Thank you!"

Ye Tiandao.

Subsequently.

The woman of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm took Ye Tian to a special private room, the space here was very large, it was a small void, and there were all kinds of delicacies.

From this premium room, you can also see the auction hall of the outside world, but the bone transformation realm of the outside world cannot peek here.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian was eating delicious food while waiting for the auction to start.

As time passed, one bone transformation realm after another entered the auction hall hall.

Finally, the auction began.

I saw an auctioneer of the six-time bone transformation realm walk up to the auction table, and after an introduction, he announced the start of the auction.

Soon, the first auction item was brought up by two women who had a bone transformation realm.

"The first auction item is a Canghe Pearl, with a starting price of 2 million primary eternal ancient gold!"

The auctioneer announced.

Under normal circumstances, the price of Canghe Beads is 3 million primary eternal ancient gold, but there is no market.

There are so many Canghe beads, and there are not a few bone transformation realms willing to sell them at all, and almost all of them are used by themselves.

Therefore, if you want to buy Canghe beads yourself, you can't buy them at all.

Therefore, many bone transformation realms are still very interested in Canghezhu, and the competition must be very fierce, and it must be a premium auction.

"Canghe Zhu, it's still useful to me. Although I have Canghe beads, the number is still not enough. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Anyway, he didn't lack eternal ancient gold now, so he definitely had to compete for this Canghe pearl.

With the announcement of the auctioneer, the auction of Canghe beads began.

"2,100,000 primary-grade eternal gold!"

"2,200,000 primary-grade eternal gold!"

"2,300,000 primary-grade eternal gold!"

Gradually, the auction price of Canghe Beads increased to 3 million Primary Eternal Ancient Gold, which was also the normal price of Canghe Pearls.

But.

It is simply impossible to win the Canghe Pearl with 3 million primary eternal ancient gold.

At the auction, the price of any treasure will almost be auctioned at a premium, but no one will regret it, because it is the treasure they need, they will bid at a premium.

"3,200,000 primary-grade eternal gold!"

Ye Tian also participated in the auction.

He estimated that the price of this Canghe Pearl would reach at least 4 million primary eternal ancient gold.

Sure enough.

A Bone Transformation Realm participated in the auction, and finally when it was close to 4 million Primary Eternal Ancient Gold, the number of Bone Transformation Realms participating in the auction was scarce.

"4,100,000 Primary Eternal Ancient Gold!"

After Ye Tian quoted this price, the other bone transformation realms all gave up.

They felt that Ye Tian, as a bone transformation realm of the special private room, must have extremely strong financial resources, and they felt that they could not compete.

In case the price is deliberately raised, if Ye Tian doesn't want it, they will be miserable.

So, they chose to give up.

In this way, the first auction item, Canghe Zhu, was taken down by Ye Tian.

Next, one auction item after another was taken out.

Auction items that are of little use to Ye Tian, he will not participate in the bidding.

But I have to admit that the items in this auction are extremely precious, and none of them are less than 1 million primary eternal ancient gold.

After a while, the price of the items auctioned was above 10 million first-grade eternal gold.

At this time, there were only 10 million primary-grade ancient gold's bone transformation realm, so they could only look at it, and they were not qualified to bid at all.

"The next auction item is a divine weapon on the other side!"

The auctioneer said.

Divine soldiers on the other side!

When Ye Tian heard this, he was immediately a little shocked.

He had been in the Eternal Ancient Demon City for so long, so he naturally knew the existence of the divine soldiers on the other side.

The Divine Weapon on the Other Side is a weapon suitable for use in the Top Bone Transformation Realm, and it is a weapon refined with some incomparably precious materials and the Golden Text of the Other Side.

The Golden Script on the Other Shore can not only create the Supreme Ancient Bone Technique, but also integrate it into weapons and become the Golden Script on the Other Shore, but how to refine it, he is not clear.

After all, he hadn't even seen Jin Wen on the other side, so he naturally didn't understand the mystery.

But there is no doubt that the Divine Soldier on the other side can greatly increase the combat power of a Bone Transformation Realm.

The difference in strength between those who have the other side and those who don't have the other side is very large.

Of course, the value of the Divine Soldier on the other side is also very high, even the most rubbish Divine Soldier on the other side is extremely precious.

"What level of Divine Soldier is this?"

A bone metamorphosis asked.

The auctioneer introduced: "It's a first-class god soldier. "

Rumble!!!

The divine soldier on the other side was presented, but it was a long sword.

For the bone transformation realm, almost all of them are all-round, good at all kinds of weapons, almost all kinds of weapons are integrated, and the use of any kind of weapon does not affect the combat effectiveness.

Therefore, everyone is very interested.

"This first-class Divine Soldier on the other side is a divine soldier on the other side that has just been created, and the starting price is 20 million primary eternal ancient gold!"

20 million primary eternal gold is not much, and the final transaction price may even exceed 100 million.

"20,000,000 primary-grade eternal gold!"

Ye Tian is also interested in competing for the auction.

His bottom line was 120 million primary-grade eternal gold, and if it exceeded that price, he wouldn't want it.

In fact, he probably doesn't have that much for weapons.

Although weapons can increase combat effectiveness, his battles often require the sacrifice of the copy body, and once the copy body is sacrificed, the weapon is lost.

That's why he's not so keen on weapons.

If the price is reasonable, he will still bid for it, but it is not necessary if it is too high.

"30,000,000 Primary Eternal Ancient Gold!"

"50,000,000 Primary Eternal Ancient Gold!"

"60,000,000 Primary Eternal Ancient Gold!"

The Divine Soldiers on the other side are too rare, at least in this area of the Eternal Ancient Demon City, so these bone transformation realms are all bidding frantically, and they don't feel expensive at all.

In a short period of time, the price of this Divine Weapon on the Other Shore exceeded 120 million Primary Eternal Ancient Gold.

At this time, Ye Tian still did not participate in the competition.

In the end, the auction price exceeded 120 million Primary Eternal Ancient Gold.

"Forget it!"

Ye Tian gave up.

After all, it's just a first-class divine soldier on the other side, not too powerful on the other side, so there is no need to spend such a high price to bid.
